arts.ttl: Report: Man City get huge boost in race for Florian Wirtz as Arsenal receive Guler disappointment
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have turned their attention to Real Madrid’s Arda er after conceding defeat in the race for Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz, according to reports. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta backs Myles Lewis-Skelly for England call-up as Ben White claim made
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta believes Myles Lewis-Skelly is ready for a place in the England team after impressing for Arsenal, despite being sent off in the defeat to West Ham on Saturday

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta says this season is 'one of proudest moments' despite title bid collapse
arts.sum: Arsenal's weekend defeat against West Ham saw their title hopes fade further but manager Mikel Arteta is still proud as the Gunners head into a big three-month period

arts.ttl: Nico Williams to Arsenal in DANGER as Chelsea target Aaron Ramsdale: FootballTransfers recap
arts.sum: Nico Williams to Arsenal in DANGER as Chelsea target Aaron Ramsdale: FootballTransfers recap Tuesday 25 February saw Arsenal face danger in their pursuit of Nico Williams and Chelsea rekindle their interest in Aaron Ramsdale.

arts.ttl: Chelsea return to top four after Nkunku and Neto sink sorry Southampton
arts.sum: When you have lost three games in a row, any win is a good win. And there is no such thing as a bad win by four goals. But equally, the context is unavoidable. This is a Southampton side who are doomed, who are letting in 2.41 goals per game, who have lost 14 of their past 17 league games and who have nothing to play for this season beyond trying to scrape together the three points that would take them above Derby’s record low of 11. The Premier League’s unique selling point is supposed to be that anybody can beat anybody, but it’s hard to square that with this Southampton. “I’m frustrated,” said Ivan Juric, who pointed out his team had defended well for 20 minutes. “It’s a really tough situation.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool draw PSG, Arsenal face PSV, Villa meet Club Brugge in last 16
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand disagrees with Mikel Arteta over four-word Arsenal title verdict
arts.sum: Arsenal’s title hopes are hanging by a thread with Liverpool now 11 points clear at the top of the Premier League but it appears that Mikel Arteta is not giving up on the race quite yet

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Jonathan David transfer boost ahead of summer after 'snub'
arts.sum: David is coming to the end of his contract at Lille in the summer and is expected to have a host of clubs lining up for his signature. And as for my future, I hope to grow, to become a better player and to play for the biggest clubs in the world, if I can," David revealed to Onze Mondial .

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans are all saying the same thing about Adam Wharton after his heroics for Crystal Palace against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Arsenal are likely to be busy in the summer transfer window as they look to strengthen their ranks in pursuit of silverware. Although the Gunners...

arts.ttl: Furious Chelsea fans protest against Todd Boehly and Clearlake Capital - 'We're not Arsenal'
arts.sum: Todd Boehly has suffered a nightmare spell since replacing Roman Abramovich as Chelsea owner in 2022 after overseeing three sackings and poor signings, with the team sliding down the Premier League table
